change_summary: Produced a machine-readable entry-extension failure audit without changing production strategy behavior.
hypothesis: Accepted-stack bad trades may contain a narrow entry short-term extension failure family where trades entered after an already extended short-term move and then mean-reverted, distinct from hold-quality, wide-stop, low-MFE, overnight gap, near-target giveback, sector breakdown, and add-on adverse audits.
notes: Audit artifact: data/entry_extension_failure_audit_exp-20260427-015.json. Extended-entry losses covered 4/6 losses, but the same flags hit 7/15 winners and put 18467.39 winner PnL at risk versus 1596.18 loss PnL avoided, so a naive filter is not supported.

locked_variables: entry short-term extension failure taxonomy v2 unique closeout
parameters.single_causal_variable: entry short-term extension failure taxonomy v2 unique closeout
